title: IDTS Product Discovery Findings
description: Structured output for IDTS BA discovery. Adapted from the Ask Why output schema by Phuc NT / BA Zone / Digital School.

business_problem.description: Underlying business problem, not the proposed solution.

business_goal.description: Measurable goal or expected business outcome.

stakeholders.description: IDTS roles or external stakeholders affected by the requirement.

pain_points.description: Current observable pain points or symptoms.

root_causes.description: Root causes identified through Ask Why analysis.

functional_requirements.description: Actionable system behaviors for CAP/Fiori or documentation.

non_functional_requirements.description: Audit, security, usability, performance, reliability, and maintainability needs.

business_rules.description: Testable IDTS business rules and transition rules.

constraints.description: Scope, school, SAP stack, timeline, deployment, or technology constraints.

risks.description: Risks with likelihood, impact, and mitigation when possible.

assumptions.description: Unconfirmed assumptions to validate before downstream specs or implementation.

dependencies.description: Decisions, documents, teams, templates, or technical artifacts this work depends on.

open_questions.description: Unresolved questions, ideally with owner and due date.

scope_classification.description: MVP, P1, P2, or out-of-scope recommendation.

impacted_idts_artifacts.description: Docs, diagrams, CAP, Fiori, test, and PM artifacts affected by the discovery.
